caption: A person wearing a red long-sleeved garment is using a belt sander in a workshop setting. The person holds a light-colored piece of wood and carefully presses its edge against the moving sanding belt of the machine. The belt sander is a dark green metal tool with two rollers. Throughout the sequence, the person’s hands manipulate the piece of wood, shifting its angle slightly to refine the edge. In the background, blurred workshop equipment and cables are visible. On-screen text appearing in a white box at the bottom center of each frame reads "[Voice: Philippe Starck]". The scene remains consistent in lighting and composition as the person continues the sanding process, with only subtle movements of the hands and the piece of wood changing between the frames.
